name: Steamed Pears
recipeIngredient: 2 Pieces Chinese cinnamon bark (=OR= Cinnamon sticks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the pears and cut them in half. Remove the core and seeds.
2. Combine the sugar and water in a small pot and boil until the sugar has completely dissolved. Allow it to cool slightly.
3. Put the pears, sugar-water mixture, and cinnamon together into a shallow bowl.
4. Set up a steamer or put a rack into a wok or pan. Add about 2 inches of water and bring to a boil.
5. Place the bowl of pears into the steamer or onto the rack. Turn the heat down to a simmer and cover with a lid.
6. Slowly steam the pears for about 15-to-25 minutes, until they are tender (the cooking time will depend on the ripeness of the pears).
7. Drain all the liquid and cinnamon stick or bark into a small saucepan and reduce the liquid to syrup by boiling it fast.
8. Remove and discard the cinnamon stick.
9. Pour the syrup over the pears and serve at once, or let the mixture cool, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until ready to serve.
